title: Dev Home
content_html:
Dev Home

This section contains technical design guidance for the repo, which is the source for the dotlineform website and deployed via GitHub Pages. The site is served on the domain dotlineform.com.

The repo also contains the locally run web app Studio, which manages the data for the site.

Docs Viewer

Docs Viewer is a shared module used to publish source markdown documents. Documents are imported and organised using the ‘manage mode’. This is hosted by Studio.

Note on document structure:

  • document metadata saved in front-matter YML.
  • parent_id is used to create a hierarchical structure to group related documents. Parent documents are often referred to as ‘folders’ or ‘sections’, because this is how they appear in the Docs Viewer index-tree. The source Markdown files are saved in a flat folder _docs/...

Key Documents

  • UI site-wide UI framework and maintenance
  • Change Requests proposed and in-progress request docs, including UI request specs and task breakdowns.
  • Architecture route/runtime building blocks, shared shell behavior, and generated-artifact flow into the live site.
  • Config checked-in config files and loader modules, what reads them, and when.
  • Data Models the main reference for generated/runtime data contracts and source-data records.
  • Scripts repo scripts, their flags, outputs, and operational responsibilities.
  • Docs Viewer the shared docs module used by /docs/ and other installed scopes (e.g. /library/).
  • Search dedicated catalogue search plus inline docs-domain search.
summary: This section contains technical reference documents that apply to the repo as a whole.
